name: html2word
description: Generate Word-compatible HTML files with perfect formatting preservation. Supports mathematical formulas (LaTeX), images, multi-level lists, and inline CSS styling.
author: Claude (Claudian)

options.style: Font style (e.g., 宋体小四, Arial12pt)
options.formula: Enable LaTeX formula support with VBA macro
options.title: Document title
options.reference: Reference Word file for style extraction
options.output: Output HTML file path (default: same as input)
